description_long: This object is a classic CRT computer monitor paired with a matching desktop tower, both in a beige plastic casing typical of late 20th-century office equipment. The monitor features a thick, boxy profile with a prominent, slightly curved glass screen, currently displaying a blue error screen. The front of the monitor is framed by a wide, matte-finished bezel with subtle rounded corners, and a small circular logo is visible on the lower right of the bezel. The desktop tower beneath the monitor has a rectangular form with a floppy disk drive, CD-ROM drive, and several buttons and indicator lights on the front panel. The rear of the monitor is vented and protrudes significantly, reflecting the deep housing required for CRT technology. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on function over form.
description: A beige CRT computer monitor with a thick bezel and matching desktop tower, featuring a blue error screen and classic late-20th-century design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the deep, boxy rear of the CRT monitor and the rectangular desktop tower beneath.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the curved glass screen with a blue error message, thick bezel, and the front panel of the desktop tower with drives and buttons.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the monitor's protruding back and the solid, unadorned side of the tower.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the vented back of the monitor and the plain back of the desktop tower.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, matte beige plastic with slightly rounded corners and a uniform width around the screen. It has a utilitarian appearance with minimal texture and a small circular logo on the lower right.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor rests on a flat, rectangular base integrated with the desktop tower, providing stable support without visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons are located on the lower right of the monitor's front bezel and on the front panel of the desktop tower, grouped together for easy access.
attribute_brand_logo: A small circular logo is present on the lower right of the monitor's front bezel.
